channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: LA Galaxy strike early, hold off New York Red Bulls 2-1 to win their record 6th MLS Cup championship
item.description: Joseph Paintsil and Dejan Joveljic scored in the first half, and the LA Galaxy won their record sixth MLS Cup championship with a 2-1 victory over the New York Red Bulls.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Arizona State, Boise State clinch CFP bids as clarity emerges in Pac-12 bowl selection process
item.description: Arizona State's leap into the College Football Playoff will enable the other bowl-eligible teams to move up the Pac-12 bowl pecking order.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: St John's coach Rick Pitino pays homage to late school legend Lou Carnesecca with vintage look
item.description: In St. John's' first game since Lou Carnesecca's death, Rick Pitino honored the legendary head coach with a vintage sweater in the arena that bears "Looie's" name.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Norris takes pole for season-ending Abu Dhabi GP and Hamilton 18th in Mercedes farewell
item.description: ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — McLaren's 26-year wait for a Formula 1 constructors' title could soon be over. Lewis Hamilton's time with Mercedes is set to end on a low.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sharks rookie forward to miss game against Florida Panthers
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks face defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers at Amerant Bank Arena on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Chicago hosts conference rival Philadelphia
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (6-15, 13th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 1 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Nikola Vucevic and the Chicago Bulls take on Tyrese Maxey and the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday. The Bulls are 8-7 in Eastern Conference games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jets take on the Blackhawks Saturday following overtime win
item.description: Winnipeg Jets (19-8, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (8-16-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 4 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Winnipeg Jets visit the Chicago Blackhawks after the Jets defeated the Buffalo Sabres 3-2 in overtime.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Hagel scores 2, Point has 4 assists in Lightning's 8-1 win over Sharks
item.description: Brayden Point had four assists and Brandon Hagel scored twice to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to an 8-1 victory against the San Jose Sharks. Jake Guentzel, Conor Geekie and Cam Atkinson each scored a goal and assist. Anthony Cirelli, Nick Perbix and Nicholas Paul scored the Lightning’s other goals.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Chicago Blackhawks fire Luke Richardson, IceHogs' Sorensen named interim head coach
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Chicago Blackhawks General Manager Kyle Davidson announced Thursday the team has fired head coach Luke Richardson. Rockford IceHogs head coach Anders Sorensen has been named interim head coach and will assume duties immediately.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Flames honor Johnny Gaudreau, welcome his family back to Calgary in emotional pre-game tribute
item.description: The Calgary Flames paid tribute to longtime star Johnny Gaudreau on Tuesday night before their game against the Columbus Blue Jackets, months after the All-Star was killed while biking on a New Jersey road this summer.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz commit 29 turnovers in 133-106 loss to OKC
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz lead the NBA in turnovers, and Tuesday night was their worst night yet. Utah committed a season-high 29 turnovers, 19 in the first half, as the Jazz go 0-4 in NBA Cup games with a 133-106 blowout loss at Oklahoma City.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Report: Michigan seeking to play Northwestern at Soldier Field in 2025
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — College football season is over for Northwestern University, but that hasn't stopped higher-ups in the administration from weighing venue options for one of its high profile matchups in 2025. According to rg.org's Paul M.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Golden State Valkyries unveil season games, home opener
item.description: (KRON) – The newest Bay Area major pro sports team, the Golden State Valkyries, has announced the date of its inaugural season at the Chase Center on Monday. The inaugural game, slated for May 16 of next year, will be a California battle with the Valkyries facing the Los Angeles Sparks.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Texas safety Michael Taaffe honors Jake Ehlinger, 'feels sorry' for fan who made sign mocking death
item.description: Taaffe had strong, passionate comments regarding a sign held up by a fan in the crowd for ESPN's College Gameday, broadcasting from the Texas A&M campus the morning before the big game.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, NewsNation

item.title: Philadelphia defense, Tucker's misses help the Eagles to a 24-19 win in their showdown with Ravens
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Saquon Barkley vs. Derrick Henry was never supposed to be a head-to-head matchup. “It ain't basketball. It ain't like I go out there and tackle Derrick Henry,” Barkley said. “To be honest, I don't know if I really want to tackle Derrick Henry.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 6 Chicagoland prep football programs bring home IHSA state championships over the weekend in Normal
item.description: Six Chicagoland prep football programs, including two from the city, claimed Illinois High School Association state championships over Thanksgiving weekend in Normal.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays respond to Pinellas commissioner's letter on stadium deal
item.description: The President of the Tampa Bay Rays has sent a response letter to the Pinellas County Board of County Commissioners following the letter to the baseball team last week.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: BYU eliminated from Big 12 contention, beats Houston
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU learned it was eliminated from Big 12 Championship Game contention at halftime, but the Cougars still had a job to do. Jake Retzlaff ran for two touchdowns and threw for 167 yards to lead No. 19 BYU to a 30-18 victory over Houston on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
